creator: _jkrow
caption:
This is one of the easiest winter waterfall hikes in Upstate NY

👉 Save for your next Upstate NY weekend!
📍 Location at the end 
💰 Entry: $20 per person 

This waterfall in Wilmington NY is a quick accessible walk over well maintained paths and glass walkways that take you past 4 waterfalls along the Ausable River.

It’s the perfect add on if you’re already visiting Whiteface or Lake Placid and it’s open all year, so you can see it in full summer flow or totally iced over in winter.
——

transcription.text: This is the easiest waterfall hike in all of upstate New York. It's located in Wilmington, about a four and a half hour drive from New York City and only 10 minutes from the town of Lake Placid. This is one of my favorite hikes in the area because it's only half a mile and it's accessible to pretty much everybody. With sturdy bridges, glass floor walkways, and well-maintained paths that hug the gorge, the trail takes you past four waterfalls that tumble into a granite gorge that was carved out over a billion years ago. You can easily complete this entire hike in under an hour so it makes a perfect stop when driving between Lake Placid and Whiteface Mountain. Check the caption for the details.
